products.name: Dioctyl Terephthalate (DOTP)
products.description: Dioctyl Terephthalate (DOTP) is a modern, eco-friendly general-purpose plasticizer that is completely free of ortho-phthalates. It serves as a direct and safer replacement for traditional DOP. Due to its non-toxic profile, DOTP is approved for use in sensitive applications such as children's toys, food contact films, medical devices, and residential flooring. The plasticizer exhibits low volatility, which prevents window fogging in automotive interiors and ensures the longevity of PVC products. It imparts excellent cold resistance and flexibility to materials. Additionally, DOTP features superior electrical insulation properties, making it the preferred choice for cable jacketing. It is a clear, oily liquid that blends easily with polymers and is compatible with standard PVC processing equipment.

products.name: PVC-S SG5 SG3
products.description: Suspension Polyvinyl Chloride (PVC-S), available in grades SG-5 and SG-3, is a high-volume thermoplastic polymer in the form of a white powder. PVC is known for its durability, chemical resistance, and fire-retardant properties. Grade SG-5 (K-value 66-68) is the most popular type, primarily used for manufacturing rigid products such as window profiles, pipes, siding, and rigid packaging. It ensures high mechanical strength and weather resistance for the final products. Grade SG-3 (K-value 72-71) has a higher molecular weight and excellent plasticizer absorption, making it ideal for soft and semi-rigid applications like cable insulation, artificial leather, linoleum, and flexible hoses. We supply resins from leading Chinese manufacturers (Zhongtai, Tianye) ensuring high purity, low volatile content, and consistent particle size for optimal extrusion performance.

products.name: Polyester resin (P102, T100)
products.description: After curing, it forms a rigid and durable polymer with excellent resistance to weathering and chemicals. It is widely used in the industrial sector for manual molding, spraying, and casting. It is characterized by high stability and optimal gel formation time, making it an ideal choice for mass production of composites.

products.name: Liquid Epoxy Resin (KER 828, DY 128)
products.description: General Purpose Liquid Epoxy Resin (equivalents: KER 828, YD 128, DER 331) is a clear, viscous liquid based on Bisphenol-A, serving as the global standard for composites and coatings. When mixed with hardeners, the resin cures into an ultra-strong, chemically resistant polymer with excellent adhesion to metal, concrete, glass, and wood. It is widely used for installing industrial self-leveling floors, manufacturing fiberglass and carbon fiber composites, adhesives, sealants, and potting compounds for electronics. Our resin is characterized by high purity, clarity, and consistent curing properties. It is solvent-free and exhibits minimal shrinkage during cure. Ideally suited for both heavy industrial applications and creative projects (countertops, Resin Art) when paired with the appropriate hardeners.

products.name: Dioctyl Phthalate (DOP)
products.description: Dioctyl Phthalate (DOP) is the most widely used and cost-effective plasticizer for PVC worldwide. It appears as an oily, colorless, or slightly yellowish liquid. DOP is used to impart flexibility, elasticity, and softness to rigid polyvinyl chloride. It is extensively utilized in the production of cable insulation, artificial leather, footwear compounds, garden hoses, tarpaulins, and packaging films. DOP offers a high gelling speed and excellent compatibility with PVC resin, simplifying the processing workflow. Despite the emergence of eco-friendly alternatives, DOP remains the industry standard for technical and industrial applications due to its optimal price-performance ratio. It is also used in the rubber industry and in the production of paints and coatings.

products.name: DBP (Dibutyl Phthalate) Plasticizer
products.description: Dibutyl Phthalate (DBP) is a low-viscosity plasticizer appearing as a colorless, oily liquid. It finds extensive application in the paint and coating industry for plasticizing nitrocellulose lacquers, epoxy resins, and PVC compounds. DBP imparts elasticity, impact resistance, and cold tolerance to coatings. Unlike DOP, it offers better compatibility with certain resin types and ensures faster gelling. It is frequently used in the rubber industry to facilitate the processing of rubber mixes. Additionally, it serves as a plasticizer for polyvinyl acetate dispersions (PVA glues) and in the production of artificial leather. Due to its higher volatility compared to DOP, its use in long-life PVC products is limited, but it remains indispensable in lacquers and coatings.
